token_strategy: Load only AGENTS.core and the selected skill SKILL.md first
Avoid loading unrelated skill references until a route is chosen
Prefer machine-readable summaries before screenshots, logs, or large docs

routes.description: GitHub, remote repo, review, release, CI, and .github workflows
token_strategy: Inspect local .github and git remote context before loading workflow YAML bodies
Prefer gh --json output over broad gh text output
Do not load browser or UI skills unless the task also changes frontend behavior

routes.description: UI regressions, screenshots, browser debugging, layout, and interaction validation
token_strategy: Use browser_automator summary.json before opening screenshots or raw console/network logs
Prefer named browser sessions and saved state over repeated fresh sessions
Keep browser artifact inspection bounded to the failing surface
Import CRX or codegen recordings once, then replay local flow JSON instead of re-describing long browser steps

routes.description: Vue SFCs, components, views, and router-facing frontend structure
token_strategy: Load only the Vue skill first for SFC and component work
Do not load UnoCSS, Vite, or VueUse skills unless the touched files or requirements point there

routes.description: Composable logic, reusable state helpers, and VueUse-heavy utility work
token_strategy: Load VueUse references only when hooks or reusable reactivity helpers are involved

routes.description: UnoCSS tokens, shortcuts, themes, utility rules, and design-system styling
token_strategy: Load UnoCSS references only for token, shortcut, utility, or theme work

routes.description: Vite config, build system, plugins, env handling, and toolchain changes
token_strategy: Load Vite references only for config, plugin, env, or build-pipeline work

routes.description: Cross-module, vague, architectural, or high-risk tasks that benefit from routing first
token_strategy: Route first, then load only the selected downstream skills
Keep the first response action-oriented and avoid reading multiple skill trees prematurely
